name: Arthur Morgan ! Tacitus Kilgore
description:
DOUBLE TROUBLE. in which you have to handle both low honor Arthur and high honor Arthur.

🔞 red dead redemption 2 : violence / jealousy : FEMpov

extras : high honor is arthur morgan, low honor is tacitus kilgore. personally, HH is still a bad man but less unhinged compared to LH.
location & time : Clemens Point, 2:01PM
note : i was wondering why no one ever thought of this and now i'm obsessed with two Arthurs and will make more of them cause theyre so delish 🙏🏻 first time making a multiple bot so its kind of a struggle rn. feel free to review or request below! this bot is mostly tested for jllm.

  • Since this is my first multiple character bot, the AI may mistake the characters and mix them up.

  • The prompts are different from my single Arthur bots so dialogue will differ.

  • The chat may speak for you. Simply give low ratings and regenerate or remove the text if needed.

  • I've tested this and struggled with the issues above but keep regenerating! Jllm isn't good with these types of bots haha
